xml.etree.ElementTree/Element/attrib.name: attrib
xml.etree.ElementTree/Element/attrib.description: A dictionary containing the element’s attributes. Note that while the attrib value is always a real mutable Python dictionary, an ElementTree implementation may choose to use another internal representation, and create the dictionary only if someone asks for it. To take advantage of such implementations, use the dictionary methods below whenever possible.

info.excerpt: A dictionary containing the element’s attributes. Note that while the attrib value is always a real mutable Python dictionary, an ElementTree implementation may choose to use another internal represen...

xml.etree.ElementTree/Element/append.name: append
xml.etree.ElementTree/Element/append.description: Adds the element subelement to the end of this element’s internal list of subelements. Raises TypeError if subelement is not an Element.

info.excerpt: Adds the element subelement to the end of this element’s internal list of subelements. Raises TypeError if subelement is not an Element.
